description.value: Aura faint divination; CL 5th; Slot hands; Price 4,000 gp; Weight 1 lb. DESCRIPTION These studded leather gloves look similar to workmanâs gloves, though they are reinforced with numerous metal strips that the user can extend or retract as she wills, turning the tip of each finger into a customizable tool useful in examining and disarming traps. While worn, these gloves grant a +5 competence bonus on all Disable Device checks made to disarm traps. In addition, the gloves grant the user a +1 luck bonus on all saving throws made against traps. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, find traps; Cost 2,000 gp.
